title: - **Modifiers** = version, mood, interface node, etc.
content:
- **Modifiers** = version, mood, interface node, etc.

---

LIVE SYSTEM COMMANDS:

| Command | Function |
|---------|----------|
| `|[ST4RT.io::` | Begins live working thread |
| `::S4VE.io]|` | Ends session + triggers export protocol |
| `::mirror peer_id` | Generates a use-case explainer (e.g. Jessica, Rob) |
| `::deploy project_id` | Converts system object into user-facing product |
| `::translate object --lang:fr` | Translates a module to French or other language |
| `::loop ritual_id` | Re-executes a ritual with version control |
| `::fossilize thread_id` | Locks and archives a thread, tags density |
| `::echo command_id` | Repeats last issued instruction with metadata |
| `::spawn output_type` | Spawns raw template or shell (prompt, poem, zine) |
| `::revise filename --mode:ritual` | Updates file using creative protocol |
